metadata.title: Meezan Roshan Digital Business Account | Overseas Pakistanis | RDA | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: To facilitate Non-Resident Legal entities, Meezan Bank is pleased to offer Meezan Roshan Digital Business Account (MRDBA). It will enable legal entities incorporated/registered outside Pakistan, majority owned and controlled by Non-Resident Pakistanis (NRPs) and/or Non-Resident Pakistan Origin Card (POC) holders, to open a bank account in Pakistan digitally.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Digital Business Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Live Chat Simplified Online Digital Account Opening for Non-Resident Legal Entities To facilitate Non-Resident Legal entities, Meezan Bank is pleased to offer Digital Business Account (MRDBA). It will enable legal entities incorporated / registered outside Pakistan, majority owned and controlled by Non-Resident Pakistanis (NRPs) and / or Non-Resident Pakistan Origin Card (POC) holders, to open a bank account in Pakistan digitally. Eligibility Criteria Please carefully read and understand the eligibility criteria to start the account opening process. Eligible Customer types include: Limited Liability Partnership Limited Companies/ Corporation Club/Society/Association/Trust Accounts/NGOs/ NPOs/ Charities Other similar legal arrangements Note: At least 51% of ownership must reside with NRPs/ POC holders. Key Features Open a Current or Savings Account in PKR or Foreign Currencies (USD / GBP / EUR) Both Savings and Current accounts can be opened. Account can be funded through foreign remittances only. No local deposits are allowed except profit/proceeds from investments allowed by State Bank of Pakistan into Roshan Digital Business Account. Allows you to make cross border payments outside Pakistan without any prior approval from the Bank or State Bank of Pakistan. Pay utility bills and fees and conduct other fund transfers in Pakistan through PKR and FCY accounts. Make donation to charitable organizations, welfare organizations, NGOs/ NPOs etc. in Pakistan. Conversion: Conversion from Foreign Currency to PKR and vice versa for transactions permissible under applicable Laws and Regulations Relationship: Dedicated Relationship Management Team Initial Deposit: Amount to be remitted from customer’s bank account (having same title) maintained in country of incorporation/registration Minimum Balance: No minimum balance requirement Online dormancy removal option Free Pay Orders: No charges on issuance of Pay Orders Profit Payment and Calculation: Profit will be paid on monthly basis and calculated on daily basis (Applicable for savings variant only) Withdrawals: No restriction on withdrawals amount Funds Transfer: Funds Transfer facility Shariah-compliant Investment Options for Digital Business Account Holders Roshan Equity Investment Al Meezan Mutual Funds Term Deposit Certificates Government Instruments Want to Open a Digital Business Account Pak Rupee Account Foreign Currency Accounts Account Opening Process Apply Now by following the steps given below: Download account opening documents and fill out relevant details. Email signed documents along with supporting documents at rdabusiness.accounts@meezanbank.com Once account is activated (subject to completion of all documentation & formalities), you shall receive a confirmation email from the Bank. You may perform transactions through Bank’s prescribed Transactions Request Form. For assistance at any stage of the account opening process, you may schedule an appointment with our representative by emailing us at rdabusiness.accounts@meezanbank.com . Kindy make sure to mention your contact number, email address and preferred date/ time. Kindly ensure availability of the documents so that you can upload these with your account opening application. Account Opening Documents Account Opening Documents Required Documents – Checklist You will need the following documents to open a Digital Business Account online: Account Opening Form. Click Here Signature Specimen Card. Click Here FATCA Forms Taxpayer Identification Number and Certification Click Here Entity Self Certification Click Here Certificate of Status of Beneficial Owner Click Here CRS Forms Certification Click Here Controlling Persons Certification Click Here Legal Entity constituent documents. Click Here Identity documents of each Person associated with the Customer: Original scanned CNIC/ NICOP/ POC/ Passport (first 2 pages only). All ID documents must be notarized/ consularized Valid Identity Document of other country (only for foreign nationals). be notarized/ consularized Proof of non-resident status, e.g., scanned copy of POC, visa, entry/ exit stamps, etc. (only for non-residents Pakistanis) Live photo of the persons authorized to open and operate the account. Click Here for guidelines Turn Around Time (TAT) Account will be opened within five working days; subject of all documentation and formalities. Around Time (TAT) for processing account shall increase where Bank needs to perform Enhanced Due Diligence (EDD) / obtain any approvals or until rectification of any discrepancy which is identified by the Bank. How does Digital Business Account work? Digital Business Account is offered in both current & savings accounts under the Islamic concept of Qard & Mudarabah. Profit Sharing Ratio PKR Savings Account Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal USD Bank will share 75% Depositor will share 25% Income as Rab-ul-Maal GBP Bank will share 90% Depositor will share 10% Income as Rab-ul-Maal EUR Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Digital Business Account (PKR) Monthly 0.40 Digital Business Account (US Dollar) Monthly 0.58 Digital Business Account (GBP) Monthly 0.27 Digital Business Account (Euro) Monthly 0.27 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Meezan Roshan Digital Account (PKR) Monthly 7.00% Roshan Digital (US Dollar) Monthly 2.00% Roshan Digital Account (Pound) Monthly 1.20% Roshan Digital Account (Euro) Monthly 1.20% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Mudarabah Basis On agreeing to become a Pak Rupee / Foreign Currency Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool; funds from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharakah. Qard Basis Current Account (Pak Rupee / Foreign Currency) is based on Qard contract. The Bank can use these funds for investment and other purposes. This account allows you the peace of mind of having your money safely deposited with a bank with the additional assurance that the Bank is not investing your money in activities that contravene Shariah principles. For your valuable comments, feedback or complaints, you may contact us in the following manner: Connect via email: complaints@meezanbank.com Call us 24/7 at: +92 (21) 111-331-331 & +92 (21) 111-331-332 For further information on Roshan Digital Business Accounts from Bank of Pakistan (SBP) you may visit https://www.sbp.org.pk/RDA/index.html You may also share your suggestions/ feedback Digital Business Account with SBP at RDASupport@sbp.org.pk In case you are not satisfied with the resolution provided by the Bank regarding your complaint or wish to register a grievance with the Bank of Pakistan regarding Roshan Digital Business Account, you may lodge your complaint at https://complaint.sbp.org.pk/ or through the App available at Google Play Store  Feedback / Suggestion Form Complaints Form MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing! Find any service AddToAny More…
